---
title: "Network Analysis"
author: "Amy Solman"
date: "27/04/2021"
output: html_document
---

#This script follows the guide/tutorial for NetComI package available at: https://github.com/stefpeschel/NetCoMi
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

#Clear workspace and load packages
```{r}
rm(list=ls())
graphics.off()

install.packages("devtools")
library(devtools)

devtools::install_github("stefpeschel/NetCoMi", dependencies = FALSE,
                         repos = c("https://cloud.r-project.org/",
                                   BiocManager::repositories()))

library(NetCoMi)

```
